studies.title: Ancillary Study on the Effectiveness of an App-Based Intervention in Axial Spondyloarthritis Patients

_verification.reason: The study specifically mentions the use of the 'Axia' app for axial spondyloarthritis (axSpA) patients, which matches the product name and description provided. The intervention arm is explicitly allowed to use the Axia app, confirming the study is about this digital therapeutic product.

_classification.reason: The study is registered but does not provide results, indicating it is a protocol. Without results, it cannot be classified as a primary RCT or RWE study.

studies._rejection_reason: The study is registered but does not provide results, indicating it is a protocol. Without results, it cannot be classified as a primary RCT or RWE study.
